thesis_bull: AMZN re-entered the momentum top-5 (rank 5/21) with 6m total return +21.11%, with the SPY trend filter engaged (SPY above 10m MA per signals.detect_regime: spy_above_50dma=true, spy_above_200dma=true, +5.47% from 50dma). The deterministic signal evaluator at EOD reproduced this byte-for-byte against the same 0630.json snapshot.
thesis_bear: Two stacking constraints make this an asymmetric NO_TRADE: (a) circuit-breaker state is OUT (exposure_fraction=0.0) — new opens are mechanically blocked by Path Z policy because computed equity drawdown is 16.16% versus the persistent peak of $119,140.25 (acknowledged-inflated artifact; lessons-pending escalated to must-fix); (b) daily-bar data is stale to 2026-04-24 (19 calendar days) — `max_data_staleness_seconds = 60` exceeded by orders of magnitude — so opening a new momentum position on a rank computed from 19-day-old prices carries a real signal-staleness risk. Either constraint alone would prevent the open; together they reinforce the NO_TRADE.
invalidation_condition: CB returns to FULL or HALF state (exposure_fraction > 0.0) AND daily-bar feed catches up to within data.max_data_staleness_seconds. Until both clear, this candidate stays in the watch column. If both clear and AMZN still confirms rank ≤ 5 at the next EOD, re-evaluate for a fresh entry decision.

position_size.sizing_basis: Strategy B target 6% of account ≈ $5,948 at quote $283.24 → 21 shares; throttled to 0 by CB OUT.

confidence_notes: Confidence in the NO_TRADE decision itself is high (≈0.95) — both gates are mechanical. The 0.55 reflects confidence in the underlying long thesis if both gates were clear, modestly above neutral because the rank-5 signal is real but near the buffer boundary and the data is stale.
risk_manager_notes: NO_TRADE reduces no risk and adds no exposure; the decision is APPROVED on the conservative side. If this had been a PAPER_BUY, risk-manager would have REJECTED on grounds: (a) circuit_breaker state=OUT throttles new opens to qty=0 per Path Z policy; (b) daily-bar data staleness exceeds max_data_staleness_seconds = 60 by ~1.6 million seconds. Either alone is a hard reject. R/R 2.5:1 ≥ 1.5 minimum (passes); position size 5.95% of account ≤ 15% cap (passes); per-trade risk 0.6% ≤ 1.5% cap (passes). Mechanical gates fail before the strategic gates matter.
compliance_notes: AMZN is on watchlist.yaml with approved_for_paper_trading=true; strategy large_cap_momentum_top5 is ACTIVE_PAPER_TEST; mode PAPER_TRADING permits all decision classes. NO_TRADE is recorded for prediction-review traceability and is the correct routing given the two mechanical gates. Schema-compliant. No live execution.
